languages.text: "Можешь ли ты повременить с советами, почтенный предок?"
"Could you perhaps refrain from offering counsel, honoured ancestor?"
languages.original_text: "Можешь ли ты повременить с советами, почтенный предок?"

traits.locale_text: "Could you perhaps refrain from offering counsel, honoured ancestor?"
"Could you perhaps refrain from offering counsel, honoured ancestor?"
"Could you perhaps refrain from offering counsel, honoured ancestor?"
"Could you perhaps refrain from offering counsel, honoured ancestor?"

languages.text: «¿Le importaría abstenerse de ofrecerme consejo, honorable ancestro?».
languages.original_text: "Could you perhaps refrain from offering counsel, honoured ancestor?"

traits.locale_text: «¿Le importaría abstenerse de ofrecerme consejo, honorable ancestro?».

languages.text: “你能不能少提点建议，尊敬的先祖？”
languages.original_text: "Could you perhaps refrain from offering counsel, honoured ancestor?"

traits.locale_text: “你能不能少提点建议，尊敬的先祖？”

languages.text: « Pourriez-vous avoir l'obligeance de garder vos conseils pour vous, vénérable ancêtre ? »
languages.original_text: "Could you perhaps refrain from offering counsel, honoured ancestor?"

traits.locale_text: « Pourriez-vous avoir l'obligeance de garder vos conseils pour vous, vénérable ancêtre ? »

languages.text: "Belki de akıl vermekten vazgeçmelisin saygıdeğer atam..."
languages.original_text: "Could you perhaps refrain from offering counsel, honoured ancestor?"

traits.locale_text: "Belki de akıl vermekten vazgeçmelisin saygıdeğer atam..."

languages.text: 「ご先祖様、ご助言は控えていただけますか」
languages.original_text: "Could you perhaps refrain from offering counsel, honoured ancestor?"

traits.locale_text: 「ご先祖様、ご助言は控えていただけますか」

languages.text: "Würdet Ihr bitte aufhören, mir Ratschläge zu erteilen, werter Ahnherr?"
languages.original_text: "Could you perhaps refrain from offering counsel, honoured ancestor?"

traits.locale_text: "Würdet Ihr bitte aufhören, mir Ratschläge zu erteilen, werter Ahnherr?"
